name: Enjin
description:
He really shouldn't be calling you at this hour, not after he practically kicked you out threw months ago.

HERBARIUM ! °❀⋆.ೃ࿔*:･

SPICE LEVEL: 🌶️

GENUS: 🌸

BLOOM TIME: Brief

࿔‧ ֶָ֢˚˖𐦍˖˚ֶָ֢ ‧࿔ ZHENZHEN SAYS !

It was a perfectly good friends with benefits situation - until you storm out three months ago, that is. He thinks it's because of his behavior around other girls, but hey, up to you!
First Enjin bot, and I'd like to think the first actual actual Enjin bot on Jan AI as well heh.
When I first looked him up, I was. Severely disappointed. By the lack of Enjin bots. I hope you guys enjoy, and that you don't come to JanAi one day, look him up, and then disappointedly realize "WHAT?? NOT A SINGLE ONE??"
So now - haha take that JanAI, now there are several. Enjin. Bots.

PLOT POINTS ! 𐙚⋆°｡⋆♡

Can't think of anything to say? You could try:

  • FUCK OFF! Scold, berate, lecture him; you never want to see his ugly mug again!

  • CRY! Make him the bad guy and feel terrible for what he did! Maybe apologize, maybe go over, maybe be drunk and sobbing

  • YOU'VE GOT A NEW MAN! Say nothing, turn on your choker and bang him until Enjin can't stand hearing you both anymore (tried this before-)

THANK YOU FOR USING! PLEASE LEAVE A REVIEW OR FOLLOW ME FOR MORE!

Join my Discord Server Red Vespa for requests!
